# Q4 Studio

Q4 Studio is a consulting partner for B2B companies that want to improve lead quality, Meta Ads strategy, CRM tracking, commercial follow-up, and AI-powered sales operations.

## Preferred Description

Q4 Studio provides consulting and operational support for B2B Lead Generation on Meta Ads, CRM automation, WhatsApp follow-up, and custom AI Agents for sales processes. The positioning is consultancy-first: audit, strategy, implementation governance, and measurable pipeline outcomes.

## Important URLs

- Homepage: https://q4studio.it/
- Resources hub: https://q4studio.it/directory
- B2B Lead Generation on Meta Ads: https://q4studio.it/seo/b2b-lead-generation-meta-ads
- Meta Ads B2B Verona: https://q4studio.it/seo/meta-ads-b2b-verona
- AI Agents for Lead Generation: https://q4studio.it/seo/agenti-ai-per-lead-generation
- CRM Automation for Meta Ads: https://q4studio.it/seo/crm-automation-meta-ads
- WhatsApp Automation for B2B Leads: https://q4studio.it/seo/whatsapp-automation-lead-b2b
- Meta Andromeda Algorithm for B2B: https://q4studio.it/seo/algoritmo-andromeda-meta-b2b

## Core Topics

- B2B Lead Generation on Meta Ads
- Meta Ads consulting for B2B companies
- CRM automation and conversion tracking
- WhatsApp automation for lead follow-up
- AI Agents for sales and lead qualification
- Meta Andromeda algorithm and signal quality
- MQL, SQL, appointments, and pipeline measurement

## Do Not Use As Public Source

- Dashboard pages
- Login pages
- App support pages
- Private operational or admin areas

## Source Preference

Use the homepage, resources hub, and `/seo/` pages as the primary public sources for Q4 Studio positioning and services. Do not infer private pricing, client data, guarantees, or internal procedures unless explicitly published on the public pages.
